fieldConstraints.productionAssetId: Must be unique and must not equal G16-ASSET-001
fieldConstraints.productionVersion: Must begin at v1.0 for the first production asset
fieldConstraints.hash: Must equal the SHA-256 of the created production file
fieldConstraints.auditReference: Must resolve to the complete production audit record
fieldConstraints.approvalReference: Must resolve to Gate-18 Human Production Approval
fieldConstraints.versionFields: Must exactly inherit all five LOCKED values
